decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and board control cards. By using cards like Counterspell, Swords to Plowshares, and Wrath of God, the deck aims to answer threats from the opponent while establishing card advantage through cards like Fact or Fiction and Standstill. The deck also utilizes land destruction with Dust Bowl and Faerie Conclave to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game tempo and outlasting the opponent's resources to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing Phyrexian Dreadnought with Stifle to create a powerful combo. By playing cards like Portent, Vision Charm, and Impulse to dig for pieces of the combo, the deck aims to quickly assemble the necessary cards. Counterspells like Foil and Force of Will are used to protect the combo from disruption, while cards like Gush and Accumulated Knowledge provide card advantage. Mishra's Factory and Chain of Vapor offer additional utility and flexibility in gameplay.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Replenish combo to return enchantment cards from the graveyard to the battlefield to create a powerful board presence. Cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave are key pieces in this strategy, while cards like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing provide removal and disruption. The deck aims to control the board while setting up its combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent with a large number of enchantments. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and allow for fast, explosive plays.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By utilizing low-cost and efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. The inclusion of cards like Ball Lightning and Fireblast provide additional burst damage to close out the game. The deck also includes tools like Grim Lavamancer and Cursed Scroll to maintain pressure and control the board.

The main focus of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt your opponent's game plan through hand disruption spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress. It aims to control the board with cards like Nether Spirit, Innocent Blood, and Contamination while generating advantage with Skeleton Scrying and Zombie Infestation. Engineered Plague and Powder Keg are used to deal with opposing creatures, while Mishra's Factory and Wasteland provide additional pressure on the opponent's resources. Rishadan Port helps to further disrupt the opponent's mana base, allowing the deck to take control of the game.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Carnophage, Dauthi Slayer, and Knight of Stromgald. The inclusion of powerful cards like Phyrexian Negator and Hatred allows for explosive plays that can quickly end the game. In addition, disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy help to disrupt the opponent's strategy and clear the way for attacks. With a focus on speed and aggression, this Mono Black Aggro deck aims to finish the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a fast and aggressive lineup of creatures and burn spells, utilizing cards like Grim Lavamancer, Jackal Pup, and Lightning Bolt to apply constant pressure. By maintaining a low mana curve and maximizing damage output, it aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total while also having options for direct damage with Fireblast and Cursed Scroll. The inclusion of cards like Urza's Bauble and Barbarian Ring provides additional utility and reach, allowing for both consistent aggression and finishing power.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures using cards like Cabal Therapy and Survival of the Fittest, and then use Zombie Infestation to turn those creatures into a steady stream of zombie tokens. Alongside aggressive creatures like Wild Mongrel and Krovikan Horror, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its fast and efficient creature-based attacks. With the help of mana accelerants like Birds of Paradise and Gaea's Cradle, this deck can generate a significant board presence early in the game and maintain pressure throughout.

The key strategy of this deck is to control the game by using disruptive spells like Sphere of Resistance and land destruction cards like Thermokarst and Wasteland, while setting up the combo of Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore. The deck also includes some removal and card advantage with cards like Sylvan Library and Naturalize. The mana base is built to support the control elements with pain lands like Forest','','');">Karplusan Forest and utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Rishadan Port.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through spells like Mana Leak and Swords to Plowshares, while using Oath of Druids to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Terravore and Call of the Herd. Cataclysm is also used to disrupt the opponent's board and seal the victory. The deck focuses on ramping up mana with Mox Diamond and utilizing efficient card draw with cards like Sylvan Library. Overall, the strategy revolves around controlling the game tempo and overwhelming the opponent with strong creatures.

This control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Duress, Cabal Therapy, and Smother, while also generating card advantage and board presence with Sylvan Library and Call of the Herd. The Rack is used to pressure the opponent's life total, while cards like Vendetta and Stupor provide additional removal and disruption. The deck also includes a small creature package with Rotting Giant and Tempting Wurm for additional threats. Overall, this deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent with a mix of disruption and threats.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to pressure the opponent and disrupt their game plan. It aims to quickly build a board presence with efficient creatures like Cabal Archon and Rotlung Reanimator, while using spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress to strip the opponent's hand of key cards. The deck also includes removal spells like Snuff Out and Smother to deal with threats. The mana base includes utility lands like Rishadan Port and Spawning Pool to further disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The deck focuses on ramping up land mana with cards like Terravore and Winter's Grasp, while controlling the board with Oath of Druids and Sphere of Resistance. It also includes disruption with cards like Naturalize and Wasteland. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and deny them resources, ultimately leading to a victory through controlling the board and managing resources effectively. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and establish dominance through a combination of efficient land mana acceleration and creature control.

The main focus of this deck is to use card draw and mana acceleration to quickly assemble a high storm count, allowing for a powerful Brain Freeze finish. By decreasing the cost of your spells with cards like Sapphire Medallion and Helm of Awakening, you can cast multiple spells in a single turn to generate a large storm count. Additionally, cards like Fact or Fiction and Cunning Wish provide additional card selection and utility to help find key combo pieces. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a massive Brain Freeze to mill their entire library in a single turn.

The main concept of this deck is to play aggressively by utilizing cards that benefit from land destruction and quickly stacking up lands in the graveyard to power up creatures like Terravore. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's mana base with cards like Vindicate and Armageddon while also controlling the board with removal like Swords to Plowshares. With the ability to ramp and fix mana using cards like Mox Diamond and Weathered Wayfarer, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats and disrupt their game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, aiming to end the game as fast as possible. It utilizes efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast to deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Price of Progress to pressure the opponent and prevent them from stabilizing. Overall, the deck's strategy revolves around relentless aggression and direct damage to secure a swift victory.
